description_long: This object consists of a set of four distinct wall-mounted lamps, each with a modern, utilitarian design. The lamps feature a combination of metallic and frosted glass components, with each fixture having a different arrangement of shades and bulbs. The central lamp has three cylindrical frosted glass shades, while the others have either two rectangular shades, a single horizontal bar with two spotlights, or a pair of conical shades. The metallic bases and arms are finished in a brushed or polished metal, providing a sleek, contemporary appearance. The lamps are designed to be mounted on a flat vertical surface, such as a wall, and are suitable for use in urban environments like hallways, bathrooms, or building exteriors. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, with minimal decorative embellishments.
description: A set of four modern wall-mounted lamps with metallic bases and frosted glass or acrylic shades, each featuring a unique arrangement of bulbs and fixtures.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four lamps in a row, clearly displaying the different shade shapes and bulb arrangements.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth and protrusion of each lamp from the wall, highlighting the thickness of the glass shades and metal bases.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back plates and mounting hardware, with the lamp shades and bulbs facing away.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the profile and how far each lamp extends from the wall.
